rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MARJORIE MILLER COMER
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: continued to march 26, 2019. Mr. Watson's clients filed an amended petition. an amended petition requires the same notice (including publication) as the petition it amends. new mailed notice and new publication is required. all documents must be filed no later than noon on Wednesday, march 20, 2019 in order to avoid an automatic continuance. the examiner still does not have a copy of the objections filed by Phyllis Comer Ashen. No proposed order submitted by Mr. Watson.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MARJORIE MILLER COMER
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
rulings.Rulings: continued to march 26, 2019. Mr. Watson's clients filed an amended petition. an amended petition requires the same notice (including publication) as the petition it amends. new mailed notice and new publication is required. all documents must be filed no later than noon on Wednesday, march 20, 2019 in order to avoid an automatic continuance. the examiner still does not have a copy of the objections filed by Phyllis Comer Ashen. No proposed order submitted by Mr. Watson.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF HUGO O. REY
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 4/2/19. No proof of service or proof of publication. Incomplete petition caption. Bond is required for a non-resident personal representative even if all heirs waive bond. The parents are not identified in item 8 of the petition with their dates of death.
